description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint and a combination of flat and slightly sloped gable roofs. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, a central entryway, and a row of trimmed hedges along the base. The left section of the house has a prominent overhang and a series of windows, while the right section includes a large garage door and a set of upper windows. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark trim around the windows, doors, and roof edges. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a practical and modern residential design.
description: A two-story suburban house with a covered front porch, garage, and a mix of flat and gable roofs. The facade features light walls, dark trim, and symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, columns, hedges, and a garage door on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the plain wall of the garage section and the overhanging roof of the main house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large window set and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid wall of the garage and a glimpse of the porch and hedges at the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, single large window on rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with covered porch, columns, steps, and decorative hedges
